sys_properties.name: u_anomaly.baseline_days
sys_properties.description: Number of days used for anomaly baseline calculation

sys_properties.name: u_anomaly.std_dev_threshold
sys_properties.description: Standard deviation multiplier to trigger Anomalous state

sys_properties.name: u_anomaly.degraded_kpi_count
sys_properties.description: Number of simultaneously anomalous KPIs required to enter Degraded state

sys_properties.name: u_anomaly.alert_suppression_enabled
sys_properties.description: Enable storm suppression — suppress duplicate anomaly events within 15 min window
